title: Long QT syndrome - NHS
text:
very low levels of potassium, magnesium or calcium 
Help and support for long QT syndrome 
If you or someone in your family lives with long QT syndrome, you can get support from charities:
British Heart Foundation: support Cardiac Risk in the Young
